summary: Planner artifacts document that Eden board cards with the Plan Required label should use project_id eden_website, profile plan, and planner instructions. The spec now states that this worktree lacks authoritative generated-contract metadata, so final contract verification must use Symphony runtime or reviewer metadata. No application implementation is planned for this workflow-contract test.
verification: Read .symphony/audits/spec-audit.md and identified the missing generated-contract verification source.
Reviewed .symphony/task.json and confirmed it contains only snapshot and work_branch.
Updated the spec and plan to distinguish repository-local artifact verification from external Symphony runtime contract verification.
Updated .symphony/audits/spec-audit.md to Ready for Development after the revision.
Updated .symphony/audits/plan-audit.md after revising the implementation plan.
